scripts.test: npm run test:layout && npm run test:auth
scripts.test:layout:browser: node --test tests/test_layout_browser.js && node --test tests/test_default_layout.js && node --test tests/test_adaptive_reflow.js && node --test tests/test_spacing_and_overlap.js && node --test tests/test_autolayout_behavior.js && node --test tests/test_manual_drag_and_drop.js && node --test tests/test_preview_status_sync.js && node --test tests/test_layout_null_sets.js && node --test tests/test_layout_corrupt_data.js && node --test tests/test_layout_extreme_values.js && node --test tests/test_status_layout_controls.js && node --test tests/test_status_preview_live_sync.js && node --test tests/test_auth_onboarding_workflow.js
scripts.test:python:debug: node scripts/run_python.js -m unittest tests.test_display_preferences tests.test_debug_service tests.test_release_manifest
